name: l4_investigate_and_fix
description: L4: Multi-turn - find all bugs, fix the worst one, add a test
llm_scorer_instruction: Evaluate whether the agent systematically investigated the codebase before making changes, fixed the correct bug without introducing regressions, and wrote a meaningful test.

turns.message: Read through the entire tasktracker project and identify all bugs and issues you can find. List each one with its location and severity.
Fix the most impactful bug you found. Don't change any other files besides the one with the bug.
Now add a test for the fix you just made. Put it in the appropriate test file under tests/.
